system.powerDescription:
With a bio-electric impulse you may force the body of a creature to carry-out a short action. If this action would require a dice roll it is done using your skills, though the equipment or physiology of a creature may add additional dice. Any rolls done to make a creature harm itself are hard. 

If you would attempt to hijack a supernatural creature (sin, drifter, exorcist, etc), roll PSYCHE to determine success. This only spends a psyche burst on success. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power.
